meaning: n.使压缩之物,括约肌,大蟒
examples: Unconsciously, an angry of Harry makes Dudley separate from a boa constrictor.
All species have a two-part Latin name, such as Boa constrictor or Homo sapiens.
Once, I did a cartoon of a boa constrictor marked Capital swallowing a rabbit marked Labour.
Instead, the computer played this very quiet move that constrained all of Kasparov's pieces, sucking the life out of his position like a boa constrictor.
Their last collectivist victory, 2-0 against France, brought to mind less the flashing flair of the matador, more the boa constrictor slowly crushing the air from its hapless victim.
